title: erythroxylum exaltatum var. ellipticum
intro: Erythroxylum exaltatum var. ellipticum is a lesser-known variety of the Erythroxylum genus, commonly referred to as a type of coca plant. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Erythroxylum exaltatum var. ellipticum include reduced pain and inflammation, as well as improved cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas and infusions, often used to support overall well-being and alleviate specific health conditions.
